---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.

This site develops **SuSiE-relax**, a fine-mapping method that lets the active
LD column relax around a reference LD matrix via an inverse-Wishart prior,
learning the relaxation level $\nu_0$. The analyses below follow the
progression of the method:

1. [SER-relax-prototype Demonstration](SER-relax-prototype-demonstrate.html) —
   the original single-effect model with full inference (quadrature for
   $q(d_j)$ and a latent precision $\omega_j$).
2. [SER-relax Demonstration](SER-relax-demonstrate.html) — the lite
   single-effect model with closed-form updates, much faster while staying
   accurate.
3. [SuSiE-relax Demonstration](susie-relax-demonstrate.html) — the multi-effect
   extension that stays robust under LD mismatch.
